ATT DWAR SERVIZZI TA’ INVESTMENT (MARKETING
OF ALTERNATIVE INVESTMENT FUNDS)

[ L.S.370.21

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.21
REGOLAMENTI DWAR L-ATT DWAR SERVIZZI TA’
INVESTIMENT (MARKETING OF ALTERNATIVE
INVESTMENT FUNDS)*
22 ta’ Lulju, 2013
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 113 tal-2013, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 218 tal2016 u 360 tal-2021 u 129 tal-2022.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
